TSCO: Q2 results fell short amid May headwinds, prompting store closures and capital reallocation
data.description:
Q2 2026 results missed expectations due to adverse May conditions, but digital sales and needs-based categories remained strong. Strategic actions include closing 75 Petsense stores, expanding pet services, and reallocating capital to remodels and delivery. Guidance reflects modest sales growth and margin pressure from freight and tariffs.
